# NEARVITY — llms.txt
# The app for spontaneous meetups between students
# https://nearvity.fr

## What is NEARVITY?

NEARVITY is an app that connects students who want to do the same thing, at the same time, nearby. Activate your signal, see who's available around you, and meet up in real life — in minutes, not days.

## How it works

1. **Activate your signal** — Choose an activity (studying, eating, sports, talking…) and go visible on the radar
2. **See who's around** — A real-time map shows other students open to the same activity nearby
3. **Meet up** — Both of you already said yes. No swiping, no awkward approach, just show up

## Who it's for

- University students fighting social isolation
- Erasmus & exchange students looking to meet people fast
- Freelancers and remote workers seeking human contact
- Anyone who wants to meet people IRL without the awkwardness of cold approaches

## What makes NEARVITY different

- **Activity-based**: People connect around shared activities (studying, eating, sports), not profiles or photos
- **Consent-first**: The signal system means both parties know the interaction is welcome before it happens
- **Ephemeral by design**: Signals expire after 2 hours, no permanent digital footprint
- **Safety-first**: Ghost mode, bidirectional blocking, GPS fuzzing (~100m), SOS emergency button
- **Anti-loneliness mission**: Built to combat the student loneliness epidemic, not to monetize attention
- **100% IRL**: No feed, no posts, no likes — just real-life meetups

## Features

- Real-time proximity radar with geolocated availability signals
- Traffic light system (green/yellow/red) for interaction readiness
- Session booking for group activities (study, sports, meals)
- Contextual icebreakers based on shared activity
- Community events with QR check-in
- Privacy controls: ghost mode, coordinate fuzzing, auto-expiration
- Available in French, English, and German
- Free to use, optional premium tier (Nearvity+ at €9.90/month)

## Company

- **Product**: NEARVITY
- **Company**: EmotionsCare SASU
- **Country**: France
- **Founded**: 2025
- **Website**: https://nearvity.fr
- **Contact**: contact@emotionscare.com
